executive_summary: The site is technically accessible and largely crawlable, but it underperforms on answer extraction and machine-readable entity packaging. The fastest gains are on page structure, schema completeness, and llms.txt guidance.

findings.title: Answer blocks are buried below generic marketing copy
findings.description: Important commercial pages make the user and model read too far before the direct claim or differentiator appears.

findings.title: Entity markup is incomplete on product and organization pages
findings.description: Current JSON-LD exposes only fragments of the organization and product graph, limiting machine-readable context.

quick_wins: Move direct answers and concrete differentiators above the fold on priority pages
Publish llms.txt pointing to homepage, product, pricing, docs, and contact pages
medium_term: Expand organization, product, and author schema with stable IDs and sameAs links
Rework product pages into tighter answer-oriented sections
strategic: Build stronger third-party entity presence on relevant platforms
Publish original research or product comparison assets worth citing
